creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Current Firefox 84.0 shows a correct list of devices in "Microphone to share" for https://www.onlinemictest.com/

But oddly, from the Skype add-on it only offers one microphone, corresponding to the playback device, and not other microphones.

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1684113
